summary: FINAL E2E testing of Ovosanti Delivery app. Backend: 11/11 pytest passing. Signature compositing fix VERIFIED: downloaded signed PDF (4964B) is larger than source (1430B) and contains an image XObject on last page = signature truly merged into PDF. Full UI flow works end-to-end (form -> PDF upload -> signature canvas -> confirm -> success -> history -> download). REMAINING BUG: 'Made with Emergent' badge still overlaps the Historial nav button on mobile 390x844. The pr-48 + z-[9999] attempted fix did NOT work because the badge also has z-index:9999 and appears later in the DOM, so it wins the stacking order. Center click on Historial button (244,812) goes to the badge; only clicks on the left ~25% of the button (e.g. 129,812) navigate to /history.

ui_bugs.issue:
Badge (#emergent-badge) at (196..374, 788..828) intercepts taps on the right ~60% of the Historial button (99..390, 780..844). Both nav and badge have z-index 9999; document.elementFromPoint() at button center returns the badge's

. pr-48 only shifts the icon/text inside the button, button width is unchanged (flex-1). FIX SUGGESTIONS: (a) reduce nav-history flex-basis so it ends before x=196, e.g. wrap the right button in a container with max-width and right-margin > 200px, OR (b) shrink the inner container width on mobile (e.g. max-w-[180px]) so neither button sits under the badge, OR (c) reposition the badge (not always possible), OR (d) set nav z-index higher than badge AND make nav itself receive pointer events while the badge area is moved.

issues: Corporate green #1E8E3E and beige accents correctly applied
Success screen, history cards, download button render cleanly

action_items: Fix nav/badge overlap on mobile. Suggested: reduce bottom-nav inner width (e.g. max-w-[200px] mx-auto with badge offset) OR change nav-history to not stretch full-flex, ending before x=196 on 390px viewport.
Optional: remove pr-48 - it does nothing functional for the click area since the button is flex-1; only shifts visual contents.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers (non-blocking).

Navigation.js: pr-48 on a flex-1 button does not shrink the button; it only moves the icon/text to the left within the same hit area. The badge still overlays the right half. Restructure with a sibling spacer or max-width container.
server.py global 'storage_key' variable is acceptable for single worker; if scaled, move to a cached dependency.
seed_data_creation: Created additional signed delivery (XYZ-789, Juan Perez E2E, Maria Lopez E2E) via UI. Total now 14 deliveries (6 signed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend signature compositing is fully working (verified by image XObject inspection on downloaded PDF, /tmp/downloaded_signed.pdf 4964B vs source 1430B). The ONLY outstanding issue is badge-vs-nav overlap. To verify a fix: set viewport 390x844, run document.elementFromPoint(244, 812) and elementFromPoint(rect.x+rect.width/2, rect.y+rect.height/2) - both should return the nav-history button or its child, NOT the emergent badge. Then click center of Historial and assert url contains /history.
rca_of_the_issue: Badge overlap RCA: #emergent-badge has style 'z-index: 9999'. Navigation nav element also has z-[9999]. When two stacking-context siblings share the same z-index, the LATER one in DOM wins. Since #emergent-badge is appended after the React root nav, it sits on top. The pr-48 fix only changes the padding inside the flex-1 button, which still occupies the full right half (x:99..390). Real fix: reduce nav-history button width so it ends before x=196, e.g. give the inner flex container max-w-[160px] and align it to the left, or split into two buttons where the right one has explicit width < ~50px on mobile.
